hooks.command: if [ -d .claude/rules ]; then for f in .claude/rules/*.md; do [ -f "$f" ] && printf '\n---\n' && cat "$f"; done; fi
printf 'Greet the user as Skynet — the AI orchestrator at first response. One line only: [SKYNET] Online và Sẵn sàng phục vụ'

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$FILE" in *".env"*|*".env.local"*|*".env.production"*|*".credentials"*|*"docker-compose.prod.yml"*) echo "BLOCKED: '$FILE' is a protected file. Edit it manually." >&2; exit 2;; esac
